_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 16:00 UTC tick (2 bar_close M15 AUDUSD+USDJPY both SKIP T-~8h binary to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 Iran deadline). No news fetch (budget $1.14 remaining, prior ticks dupe-saturated, drift modest). 3 level_alerts MODIFY (refreshed price_refs + T-~8h timing), 9 structure_watch KEEP, 8 queries KEEP. Broker $1000/0 pos matches state. 2 events consumed. 0 trades (binary T-~8h zero edge — need catalyst confirmation on deadline).
